summary: FQ-05 Attunement system MVP: player magic resource with a world-saved current pool and a live-computed maximum (player_defaults.base_max_attunement 50 + ancestry attunement_bonus + gear attunement_bonus, with a documented FQ-06 perk join point). Constant regen everywhere scaled by ancestry attunement_regen_mult; all live ancestries omit the hooks so non-magic play is unchanged. First active use: attune_pulse (R) spends 15 on a harmless fading light pulse with its own cooldown. HUD Attunement bar under health; amulet_focus (+10) is the first gear carrier; five tuning keys validator-required; extension points documented in the future-progression doc. Review's should-fix applied: the load path no longer clamps saved attunement against a stale pre-gear cap — smoke proves 55 attunement under a gear-raised max of 60 survives save/load exactly. Smoke 157 -> 163.
scope: FQ-05 only, per docs/FABLE_TASK_QUEUE.md. Implementation commit d47dc7c plus this evidence-only packet commit; pushed to origin/main per operator request.
next_action: FQ-06: visual player skill tree navigator (perk effects join max_attunement()).
